channel.title: RoundSignal - Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle. Free preview at https://getroundsignal.com/sample.html - the full scored list is for subscribers.

item.title: RoundSignal: this week's free preview
item.description: The current issue's free preview - top accounts with full details, refreshed every Monday. Subscribers get the complete scored list by email.
